activate_when: user asks for a code review checklist
user asks for a pull request or PR checklist
user asks for OWASP, Firebase, performance, or TypeScript review checklist
user asks whether code changes are merge-ready using checklist gates
do_not_activate_when: user asks to review non-code products, books, courses, services, or options
user asks for generic project management checklist without code artifacts
user asks for deep exploit analysis better handled by audit-security
minimum_inputs: package manifest or npm audit output
missing_input_behavior: return needs_context with minimum_inputs_missing and no fabricated checklist results
